name: Tripura PSC – Assistant Technical Officer – 220 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Tripura PSC ATO Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 220 Assistant Technical Officer Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tripura PSC Recruitment 2026 offers 220 vacancies for Assistant Technical Officer posts. Eligible candidates with B.Tech/BE, MCA can apply online from 12-05-2026 to 05-06-2026 through the official Tripura PSC website, tpsc.tripura.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Directorate of Information Technology, Dept. of Industries & Commerce (IT), Govt. of Tripura

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Band-3: Rs. 10230–34,800/-, Grade Pay Rs. 4800/- (Level-13, Tripura State Pay Matrix 2018)

selection_process: Written Examination (170 marks) + Interview/Personality Test (30 marks)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the TPSC Online Application Portal, accessible on the official website https://tpsc.tripura.gov.in. Hard copy applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. The online portal will be active from 12-05-2026 to 05-06-2026 (5:30 PM). New users (first-time applicants) must complete One Time Profile Registration (OTPR) on the TPSC website before applying - a User ID will be generated and sent to the registered mobile number/email ID upon successful registration.
